deliveryDetails.title: Delivery details
deliveryDetails.subtitle: Planning guidance for scheduling, site access, and on-site coordination.

scheduling.title: Scheduling
items: Provide lead time based on project size and mix requirements.
Confirm the delivery window before pour day.
Dispatch may call or text if conditions change.

access.title: Access
items: Keep driveways and access routes clear for truck arrival.
Confirm turning radius, gate codes, and site entry details.
Maintain overhead clearance for chutes and lines.

unloading.title: Unloading
items: Confirm where the truck can safely stage and pour.
Customer is responsible for site readiness and access.
Crew coordination is required for safe discharge.

sitePrep.title: Site preparation
items: Subgrade, forms, and reinforcement should be ready before arrival.
Verify elevations and placement areas in advance.
Use caution around power lines and overhead hazards.

cancellations.title: Cancellations
items: Notify dispatch as early as possible if plans change.
Late changes may affect availability for the scheduled window.
Fees may apply for short-notice cancellations.

deliveryDetails.disclaimer: Details may vary by project and availability.

checklist.title: What to include in your request
checklist.subtitle: Clear details help us align scheduling and logistics.
items: Project location, access notes, and staging constraints.
Target pour date, time window, and estimated volume.
Mix type or strength target with any additives required.
Placement method, finish requirements, and crew readiness.
Site conditions that may affect truck access or timing.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to common scheduling and delivery questions.

items.question: How far ahead should we schedule a pour?
items.answer: Share your target date as early as possible so we can align mix design and availability.

items.question: Can you help with mix recommendations?
items.answer: Yes. We align mixes to strength targets, placement method, and finish requirements.

items.question: What details help dispatch plan deliveries?
items.answer: Provide site access notes, staging plan, volume, and preferred sequencing.

items.question: Do you coordinate delivery changes?
items.answer: We share updates when schedules shift and align on a workable window.

items.question: Can I request documentation for submittals?
items.answer: We can share documentation and batch records upon request.

items.question: Do you deliver across the Wasatch Front?
items.answer: Yes. We cover Salt Lake, Utah, Davis, Weber, Tooele, and surrounding areas.
